ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "uni_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the university */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the university */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of university (e.g., 4-year, Private not-for-profit) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Estimated size of the university in acres */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was founded */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Current accreditation status */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Percentage of applicants accepted */,
  "student_to_faculty_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of students to faculty */,
  "campus_type" TEXT /* Type of campus (e.g., urban, suburban, rural) */,
  "endowment" REAL /* Total endowment of the university */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uni_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment" (
  "enroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "uni_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment record */,
  "total_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "graduate_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of graduate students */,
  "undergraduate_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of undergraduate students */,
  "international_students" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  "part_time_students" INTEGER /* Number of part-time students */,
  "full_time_students" INTEGER /* Number of full-time students */,
  "gender_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of male to female students */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of students by ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_uni_id FOREIGN KEY ("uni_id") REFERENCES universities ("uni_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campus_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail record */,
  "uni_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "acreage" INTEGER /* Size of the campus in acres */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* List of campus facilities */,
  "sports_programs" TEXT /* List of sports programs offered */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the region where the university is located */,
  "campus_security" TEXT /* Description of campus security measures */,
  "sustainability_initiatives" TEXT /* List of sustainability initiatives */,
  "campus_wide_wifi" TEXT /* Availability of campus-wide Wi-Fi */,
  "accessibility_features" TEXT /* List of accessibility features for students with disabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campus_details_uni_id FOREIGN KEY ("uni_id") REFERENCES universities ("uni_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "uni_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree offered (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department responsible for the program */,
  "program_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "program_requirements" TEXT /* List of program requirements */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* List of admission requirements */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "program_ranking" TEXT /* Ranking of the program (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_programs_uni_id FOREIGN KEY ("uni_id") REFERENCES universities ("uni_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee record */,
  "uni_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* Academic year for the fee record */,
  "tuition_in_state" REAL /* Tuition fee for in-state students */,
  "tuition_out_of_state" REAL /* Tuition fee for out-of-state students */,
  "other_fees" REAL /* Other fees (e.g., room and board) */,
  "room_and_board" REAL /* Cost of room and board */,
  "books_and_supplies" REAL /* Cost of books and supplies */,
  "transportation" REAL /* Cost of transportation */,
  "other_expenses" REAL /* Other expenses (e.g., health insurance, personal expenses) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_fees_uni_id FOREIGN KEY ("uni_id") REFERENCES universities ("uni_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid record */,
  "uni_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "aid_type" TEXT /* Type of financial aid (e.g., Scholarship, Loan) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of financial aid */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for eligibility */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for applying for financial aid */,
  "renewal_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for renewing financial aid */,
  "number_of_awards" INTEGER /* Number of awards available */,
  "average_award_amount" REAL /* Average amount of financial aid awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_uni_id FOREIGN KEY ("uni_id") REFERENCES universities ("uni_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_life" (
  "life_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student life record */,
  "uni_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "clubs" TEXT /* List of clubs and organizations */,
  "events" TEXT /* List of events and activities */,
  "housing_options" TEXT /* Housing options available for students */,
  "campus_culture" TEXT /* Description of the campus culture */,
  "student_organizations" TEXT /* List of student organizations */,
  "recreational_facilities" TEXT /* List of recreational facilities */,
  "cultural_events" TEXT /* List of cultural events */,
  "health_services" TEXT /* Description of health services available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("life_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_life_uni_id FOREIGN KEY ("uni_id") REFERENCES universities ("uni_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alumni" (
  "alumni_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alumnus */,
  "uni_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year of graduation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the alumnus */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation */,
  "current_employer" TEXT /* Current employer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the alumnus works */,
  "alumni_network" TEXT /* Description of the alumni network */,
  "notable_achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements of the alumnus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alumni_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alumni_uni_id FOREIGN KEY ("uni_id") REFERENCES universities ("uni_id")
)
